'''matate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nugatorily|nugatorily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nugatorily|nugatorily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| matate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:matate|matate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:matatesher|matatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:matatesherĂ«m|matatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:matatero|matatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:matateshĂ«|matateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:matateshĂ«m|matateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimatatero|gokimatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimatateshĂ«|gokimatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimatateshĂ«m|gokimatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomatankerom|gomatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomatankeshĂ«|gomatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomatankeshĂ«m|gomatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomatankeya|gomatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mataterom|mataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:matatemu|matatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:matateya|matateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimataterom|gokimataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimatatemu|gokimatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimatateya|gokimatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:matatate|matatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:matatatesher|matatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:matatatesherĂ«m|matatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:matatatero|matatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:matatateshĂ«|matatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:matatateshĂ«m|matatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimatatatero|gokimatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimatatateshĂ«|gokimatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimatatateshĂ«m|gokimatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomatatankerom|gomatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomatatankeshĂ«|gomatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomatatankeshĂ«m|gomatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomatatankeya|gomatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:matataterom|matataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:matatatemu|matatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:matatateya|matatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimatataterom|gokimatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimatatatemu|gokimatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimatatateya|gokimatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠtĂŠte|mĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠtĂŠtesher|mĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠtĂŠtero|mĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠtĂŠtero|gokimĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠtĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠtĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠtĂŠterom|mĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠtĂŠtemu|mĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠtĂŠteya|mĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠtĂŠterom|gokimĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠtĂŠteya|gokimĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:maftafte|maftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:maftaftesher|maftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:maftaftesherĂ«m|maftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:maftaftero|maftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:maftafteshĂ«|maftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:maftafteshĂ«m|maftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimaftaftero|gokimaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimaftafteshĂ«|gokimaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimaftafteshĂ«m|gokimaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomaftafnkerom|gomaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomaftafnkeshĂ«|gomaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomaftafnkeshĂ«m|gomaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomaftafnkeya|gomaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:maftafterom|maftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:maftaftemu|maftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:maftafteya|maftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimaftafterom|gokimaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimaftaftemu|gokimaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimaftafteya|gokimaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
